calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-09-2025 Discharged

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2023 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:08:13 a.m. and concluding at 10:26:33 a.m.

Ronnie Chow, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Belatrix Software, Inc.
Defendant Swyft, Inc. not appearing.

PAULA ANTONIOLI and DIMPLE SEHGAL are sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.
Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

PAULA ANTONIOLI is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Belatrix Software, Inc., and against Defendant Swyft, Inc. as follows:

Damages: $53,036.80
Attorney Fees: $800.00
Costs: $520.00

Total Judgment: $54,356.80

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date. (D505)
